tags.title: Tag management ({{count}})
tags.subtitle: Tags you can apply to employees. Deleting one also removes it from each employee.
tags.emptyHint: Add a new tag using the form above
tags.deleteRemoves: This tag will be removed from {{count}} employees.

assignment.noPlanForRecord: This record has no floor plan
assignment.title: Assignment
assignment.subtitle: Select an area and place employees on the active spec.
assignment.noShiftPrompt: To start assigning, first register a work system (shifts).
assignment.publishToAssign: Publish the spec in the layout editor to enable assignment
assignment.mismatchPrefix: This day contains data changed from the shift settings at the time. To review what it was then, see the

detail.noShiftHint: Register shifts first to assign from this screen
detail.noSpec: No spec applies to this date
detail.noSpecHint: Publish a spec in the layout editor and set its effective date on or before this date to assign from this screen
detail.noSpots: This area has no spec spots
detail.noSpotsHint: Set up the floor plan and spots in the layout editor
detail.unassignedSpotHint: Tap or drag an employee from the unplaced list on the left to place them.
detail.help: Tap a spot to see the assigned employee's details or unassign them. Assign by tapping or dragging.
detail.confirmBody: Confirm the placement for this day and shift. Once confirmed, it appears in the viewer. Proceed?
detail.saveDraftBody: Save the placement for this day and shift as a draft. (It won't appear in the viewer)

siteRoleDesc.general: View only: home, history, and viewer

list.title: Members
list.subtitle: Manage the members who use haizu, along with their permissions and assigned sites.

form.inviteSubtitle: Send an email invitation and set permissions and assigned sites
form.orgRoleAdminDesc: Access to all sites and organization settings
form.siteRolesHint: (you can set different permissions per site)
form.selectAtLeastOneSite: Select at least one assigned site

sites.title: Site management
sites.subtitle: Rename or deactivate sites. Inactive sites don't appear on the site selection screen.

dialog.name: Site name
dialog.descriptionPlaceholder: Notes such as the site's purpose or location (optional)
dialog.activateHint: Deactivated sites don't appear on the site selection screen.

setup.title: Initial setup
setup.subtitle: To start using haizu, complete the following 3 steps in order. ({{done}}/{{total}} done)
setup.shiftsDesc: Set up the site's work system (shift rotation and shifts).
setup.areasDesc: Create the floor map and placement spots, then publish the spec.
setup.areasDescDraft: You have a draft spec. Publishing the spec completes this step.

editor.listSubtitle: Select an area to set up its floor plan and placement spots.
editor.lockedEditing: In use for assignment, so it can't be edited
editor.cantUnpublishLocked: Can't unpublish because it's in use for assignment
editor.deleteAreaConfirm: Delete "{{name}}". Its floor plan and placement spots will all be deleted and can't be recovered.
editor.spotResizeHint: You can also drag the handle at the spot's bottom-right to change it
editor.cantDeleteLocked: Can't delete because it's in use for assignment
editor.publishDesc: will be published. In assignment and the viewer, this version is used for dates on or after the effective date.
editor.notLatestWarn: is not this area's latest version, so publishing won't make it used in assignment or the viewer. To update the latest content, create and edit a new version.
editor.saveDraftDesc: Save the current spot layout as a draft. It won't be published.
editor.planOptional: The floor plan is optional. You can upload it from the panel on the right

viewer.title: Placement viewer
viewer.subtitle: Select an area to display its current placement in a large view. The content follows each area's settings.
viewer.noPlan: This area's floor plan is not set
viewer.noPlanHint: Register a floor plan in the layout editor

history.title: Placement history
history.subtitle: Records of past assignments. You can review by date, shift, and area.

employees.title: Employees
employees.subtitle: {{count}} employees at {{site}}. You can search, filter, and import from CSV.
employees.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, employee number, or tag

import.title: CSV import preview
import.hasErrors: There are rows with errors, so importing isn't possible. Fix the CSV and upload again.

shifts.title: Work style (shift) settings
shifts.subtitle: Decide the shift types for this site.
shifts.dupTime: There are shifts with the same start and end times
shifts.singleDesc: One shift per day. No time-based divisions.
shifts.multiDesc: Divide by name and time, e.g. day, late, and night.
shifts.deletedNotice: Assignment drafts in progress for deleted shifts will be discarded when you save.
shifts.singleRunNote: Runs with no shifts (one per day). Assignment and viewer treat it without divisions.
shifts.confirmBody: Assignment drafts in progress for changed or deleted shifts will be discarded. Save anyway?

viewerSettings.title: Placement viewer settings
viewerSettings.subtitle: Configure how the large-screen viewer displays each area.
viewerSettings.areaDisplaySubtitle: Choose how the viewer displays this area.
viewerSettings.manualDesc: Always show the specified date and shift.
viewerSettings.autoDesc: Automatically show today's shift based on the current time.
viewerSettings.noConfirmedYet: There are no confirmed placements for this day yet
viewerSettings.autoBasedOn: Switches based on the time ranges in the work style (shift) settings.
viewerSettings.leadLabel: How many minutes before/after the shift start to display
viewerSettings.leadExample: e.g. 30 min before → switch to the next shift's placement 30 minutes before the shift starts. 30 min after → switch 30 minutes after the shift starts.

orgSettings.title: Organization settings
orgSettings.subtitle: Manage organization-wide information such as the organization name.
orgSettings.adminOnlyTitle: This screen is available to admins only
orgSettings.adminOnlyHint: Changing organization information requires admin permissions.

login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Log in with your email and password.
login.invalidCredentials: The email or password is incorrect

forgot.title: Reset password
forgot.emailStepDesc: We'll send a verification code to your registered email.
forgot.sendFailed: Failed to send the verification code
forgot.resetStepDesc: Enter the verification code we sent and your new password.
forgot.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least {{min}} characters
forgot.otpInvalid: The verification code is incorrect or has expired

verify.title: Verify your email
verify.subtitle: Enter the verification code we sent to {{email}}.

invite.title: Accept invitation
invite.doneDesc: Please log in with the password you set.

selectSite.title: Select a site
selectSite.subtitle: Choose the site you want to work with. Employees and assignments are managed per selected site.

account.title: Account settings
account.subtitle: Change your name, email address, and password.

hub.title: Settings
hub.subtitle: Manage the various settings for running this site here.

shifts.title: Work style (shift) settings
shifts.description: Manage this site's shift types (names and time ranges).

tags.title: Tag management
tags.description: Add, edit, and delete tags applied to employees.

viewer.title: Placement viewer settings
viewer.description: Configure how the large-screen viewer displays each area.
